caption: The video captures a sequence of military aircraft taxiing on a runway at an airbase. Initially, two large aircraft are seen moving side by side along the tarmac, with one appearing to be a specialized surveillance plane equipped with a radar dome on its back. As the video progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the surrounding area, including additional aircraft and hangars in the background. The sky is partly cloudy, suggesting a calm day, and the grassy fields adjacent to the runway add to the serene yet active atmosphere of the airbase. The planes continue their coordinated movement, likely preparing for takeoff or repositioning within the base.
